title: Rebel into the Past
overview: 6 Arthurs and their support fairies are sent on a mission into the past. In order to save the future, they must face and fight one million Arthurs.

title: The Forbidden Sacred Sword
overview: Renkin is upset after being treated like a child, but a scholarly bookworm sees right through her. Will she be able to handle trouble all on her own?

title: Fists of Fury
overview: Tekken and Kakka infiltrate a mine to look for an Excalibur but it seems too good to be true. A little more digging reveals a troubling secret.

title: With Love from the Sacred Land
overview: Yamaneko visits a sacred land for fans of her favorite idol, but her hopes of saving the city are shot down by a vengeful vegetarian sniper.

title: A Rotten Art
overview: When Kakka is forced to cross-dress to sneak into an all-girls school, he has an unfortunate brush with the art club which reveals their twisted perversions.

title: The Arthur Who Fished for Stars
overview: The girls are having some fun in the sun until a swimsuit thief starts running wild. Can they capture the culprit before everyone is fully exposed?

title: Rosebud
overview: Rurou gets swept down a river and Bethor has declared him dead. Even when history changes for the better, the mission to destroy Excaliburs must go on.

title: Call Us Magical Girls
overview: A trio of girls with magical powers fight to protect their city. To break their Excaliburs and correct history, the heroes must become the bad guys.

title: Within the Beautiful Light
overview: Tekken encounters an idol who is being chased by her fanatic fans. Luckily for her, Tekken feels obligated to help and becomes her temporary bodyguard.

title: Despair for the Future
overview: When the odds are stacked against them, the group must decide to flee or fight. However, a lopsided battle ends up being the least of their worries.

title: The Legend Fairy
overview: After their encounter with Pharsalia, the team abandons ship. Now it's up to their one-and-only leader to corral the crew and complete their mission.

title: Failure as a Leader
overview: Since Dancho won't take things seriously, Rurou and Kakka go off on their own. But she'll do whatever it takes to earn their trust and will fight to get them back.

title: Goodbye, Yama
overview: The team looks far and wide to find Yamaneko, but she's already become a changed person. Dancho is forced to say goodbye to the Yama she loves so dearly.

title: Shivering Secret Hot Springs
overview: Like Yamaneko found out, not all hot springs are equal. But that doesn't stop everyone else from taking a dip and creating problems of their own.

title: I Love Tasty Stuff
overview: When a gourmet destination turns out to be a dump, Dancho and crew put their cooking skills to the test in a cuisine showdown versus one snobby chef.

title: Utahime is Here! Rah! Rah! Rah!
overview: Imagine Yamaneko's delight when Utahime stops by for a visit. But as Yamaneko founds out, there's more to her favorite idol than meets the eye.

title: Captain Dancho
overview: Dancho and the others are forced to the field for a game of soccer. Can they somehow manage to work together and defeat the best team in Britain?

title: Altered History
overview: A city is at war due to opposing views. Kakka seems determined to do the right thing, even if it means abandoning both team and mission.

title: Stolen Excalibur
overview: After all that happened, Kakka is in a hurry to prove himself. But when things go amiss and someone gets hurt, he digs deep for power within.

title: Watch out, Little Red Riding Hood
overview: Despite all her research, Renkin isn't the first to successfully Fairy Combine. But when she storms off to hit the books again, she is swiftly wooed by a persuasive prince.

title: The Journey to Combine
overview: The stakes are raised when an Excalibur is detected in Britain's largest casino city. But they aren't having much luck finding it until Bethor goes all-in.

title: Demise of Legend
overview: Desperate to Fairy Combine, Dancho lands herself in a pinch with Tekken. What's more, a dreadful enemy threatens to destroy everyone on the spot.

title: Into the Rebel Future
overview: The team must look deep within to answer the big decision ahead of them. Will Dancho and the team flee to the future or fight Pharsalia and unite as one?
